title: cyathea atrovirens var. ciliatopaleacea
intro: Cyathea atrovirens var. ciliatopaleacea, commonly known as the Ceylon tree fern, is a variety of tree fern native to Sri Lanka. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Cyathea atrovirens var. ciliatopaleacea include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin problems, among others. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, which can be administered orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
